allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./server/pptx-utils.js'\).then\(async m => { const {default: admZip} = await import\('adm-zip'\); const {default: fs} = await import\('fs'\); const buf = fs.readFileSync\('sample.pptx'\); const zip = new admZip\(buf\); const slides = m.parseSlides\(zip\); const s2 = slides.find\(s=>s.index===2\); s2.elements.filter\(e=>e.type==='text'\).forEach\(e=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\({id:e.id,text:e.text.substring\(0,50\),bounds:e.bounds}\)\)\); }\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('slides:', len\(d.get\('slides', d.get\('patches', []\)\)\), 'keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:10]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); slides = set\(t['slideIndex'] for t in d.get\('tags',[]\)\); print\('slide indexes in tags:', sorted\(slides\)\); print\('tags count:', len\(d.get\('tags',[]\)\)\);print\('pptxFile:', d.get\('pptxFile',''\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); slides = set\(t['slideIndex'] for t in d.get\('tags',[]\)\); print\('slide indexes:', sorted\(slides\)\); print\('tags count:', len\(d.get\('tags',[]\)\)\);print\('pptxFile:', d.get\('pptxFile',''\)\)")
